feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sap Customer checkout Monitor Inconsistent status for some articles posting entries
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Recently an inquiry came from a one of our customers whose having cafe's and Minimarts . So one of there minimart has two pos machines and when do sales from those checkouts most of the transactions are stuck in the sap customer checkout monitor not posting to the SAP business one Hana backend and when checked those inconsistent entries , error message displays as below ,

004 - SQL Error (
0010000108):
SAP DBTech JDBC: [339]: invalid number: Failed to parse constant EA

 Sap customer checkout V2.0 FP18 PL16

Sap business One V10 Hana FP2111

So if anyone of you can give us an advice to overcome this matter , It's greatly appreciated .

Thanks on advance .

Best Regards,

Tharindu

entry.title: Alerts not working after upgrade to version 10
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a user-defined alert that stopped working after upgrading to version 10. After going through some documentation/forums, they mentioned Job Service-Alert entry: Log on to the SLD. Under the Services tab, make sure that the Job Service-Alert entry and its URL is present.
Is this different from the Job Service? 

The status under mailer settings are starting.. but when I test the connection it says ok.

On the Alert and Scheduling tab the SAP B1 user is workflow and not AlertSvc. I also dont have the option to choose the company/schema where the alert should run.

Should this be reconfigured so the alerts can work again? If so, please can you let me know how.

We are on SAP Business One 10 for HANA, FP2208

Thank you.
Jerusha

entry.title: Cancelar Nota de Saída (Nenhum registro concordante encontrado NFN4)
entry.content:
Ao tentar cancelar uma Nota Fiscal de Saída, a o erro Nenhum registro concordante encontrado '' (NFN4) (ODBC -2028) [Mensagem 131-183] aparece. Fiz uma consulta nessa tabela e percebi que se trata de sequência, mas todas elas estão configuradas.

Foram 4 notas sendo canceladas, 3 deu certo, apenas essa em questão deu erro.

Não houve atualização de sistema entre os cancelamentos.

entry.title: You cannot change the UoM group unless the new UoM group includes the set of conversion rules of the
entry.content: I am creating a new item, for this item not a single transaction took place but when I am going to change the UOM group, system is generating this message "You cannot change the UoM group unless the new UoM group includes the set of conversion rules of the original UoM group. Need guidance for this

entry.title: SAP 10 FP 2405 Server Resources
entry.content:
Experts,

Having upgraded several clients to SAP 10 FP 2405 MS SQL version we have noticed the resources maxing up and quite a bit of bloatware with this version. Both RAM and CPU are frequently maxing out. The server is slow and constantly freezes.

For example 16 GB RAM on a 4 Core server is maxing out frequently with not more than 3 users connected at a time. This gets worse with service layer activated. How else can we use the web client ?

I also cannot explain the extra services running - SAPMachine Binary, Apache Commons, Apache HTTP server - running and seemingly taking up resources. What is the optimal server spec required for running this version ? Screenshot attached with two users logged in. RAM is at 81% . RAM capacity is 16GB.

entry.title: FMS is not wokring quantity * U_KG SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

SELECT T1.Quantity * T1.U_KG
FROM RDR1 T1
WHERE T1.ItemCode = $[$1.ItemCode]

OR

SELECT T1.Quantity * T1.U_KG from RDR1 T1 where T1.ItemCode = $[$38.1.0]

This both FMS is not working, SAP B1, SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Chapter ID (HSN Code) upload via DTW SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need to upload chapter ID (HSN Code) item wise via DTW. 

I have tried with DTW template but it is not allowed to update into SAP b1.

SAP B1, SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: MAKE SECURE localhost 50K port SSL Install in Windows SQL Server
entry.content:
Dear SAPTechUsers,

On Windows SAPB1 Application Server

I am currently facing an issue with the SAPB1 SQL DB Server API access page at https://127.0.0.1:50000. The browser shows it as "Not Secure". Can anyone help me make this a secure connection?

Where to Install SSl Certificate on Service Layer. Procedures - Any SAP Refer notes.

Additionally, I would like to know where to install the SSL certificate and which specific SSL vendor to use. I am considering options like GoDaddy, Bluehost, or CloudFlare.

entry.title: DTW- Outgoing Payment Upload - Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to upload an Outgoing Payment using the Data Transfer Workbench (DTW) in SAP Business One with the DocType set as Journal Entry. I am using two templates: Payment and Payment_Invoices.

However, since Journal Entries (JE) do not have a DocEntry field like AR and AP invoices, I encountered the following error when uploading:

"Invalid document number [VPM2.DocEntry][line: 1] Invalid document number [VPM2.DocEntry][line: 1]65171"

I have tried using TransId and Document No for the DocEntry field, but they did not work. Also, I couldn't find a DocEntry field in the OJDT table.

Is there any way to successfully upload the Outgoing Payment in this case? I would really appreciate your guidance.

Thank you!

entry.title: Transaction Type OF OINM TABLE
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have successfully extracted data from the OINM table in SAP B1 10.0.

Could you please provide details on the types of transactions recorded in this table?

the transactions here :

Thank you for your assistance.

 

Transaction Type
310000001
20
60
67
59
21
19
18
202
15
10000071
69

entry.title: É possível vincular os pedidos de compras à notas fiscais/recebimentos já lançados?
entry.content:
Boa tarde, colegas

Por um erro na integração de um add-on, alguns documentos de entrada (nota/recebimento) acabaram sendo lançados sem o vínculo com o pedido de compras. Existe algum meio de vincular os documentos?

Sistema: SAP Business One 9.3 - 9.30.230 PL 13

entry.title: FMS SUM HEADER FIELDS
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

I want to define a formatted search to add two fields in the order header, so that the total in the third field appears after exiting the second typed field.

I have defined 3 fields of type units and totals and structure amount.

SELECT $[ORDR.U_RTC_Principal] + $[ORDR.U_RTC_Intereses]

I want to get the total from the sum of the first 2, but if I use the + symbol (Sum), it concatenates them and if for example I use * (multiplication) it gives me an error "1).

SELECT $[ORDR.U_RTC_Principal] * $[ORDR.U_RTC_Intereses]

[Microsoft][ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server][SQL Server]Operand data type nvarchar is invalid for multiply operator.
2). [Microsoft][ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server][SQL Server]Statement 'Alertasrecibidas' (OAIB) (s) could not be prepared.

entry.title: Service Call Scheduling via SDK
entry.content:
Hi all,Is there anyway to hook into the service call scheduling via SDK?

I haven't found any other answers to this and documentation below suggests that it can be done. Does anyone have any knowledge on this or code snippets that may assist?

https://help.sap.com/doc/addd48d2bec84621b6bddf9d81a0b701/10.0/en-US/SDKHelp/SAPbobsCOM~ServiceCallSchedulings_members.html

 

Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Year-End Process Duplicated – Retained Earnings Posted Twice
entry.content:
We've encountered an issue where the year-end process was duplicated. Two different users had the year-end closing window open simultaneously.

Initially, they were troubleshooting some errors, and both ended up executing the process. Instead of SAP preventing the duplicate execution or crashing for one of them, the system allowed both executions, resulting in the same amount being posted to Retained Earnings twice.

Has anyone experienced this issue before? Any insights on why this happened?

Thanks

entry.title: RSP Backup Mail Subject Customization
entry.content:
Dear SAPTechUsers,

I Am Looking for a Solution for, RSP Backup Tool - Email's SUBJECT Automation,

I Need to Customized Subject line, according to Database Name or Job Name

entry.title: Import Sales Dimensions
entry.content:
Hi, I tried to import the "Sales dimensions" like the length, width, height and volume through "Import From Excel" and "DTW" but it's not updating even after not getting an error while uploading. 

Are there a working templates with an example regarding the same. 

Note: There are many UoM for the same item and I am trying to upload for all of them, but even when I tried for one UoM I got the same result as explained above.

entry.title: Crystal Reports - SAP Business One - GS1 Datamatrix Code
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

i like to create a Datamatrix Code with GS1 Standard. As far as I know Crystal report does not support Datamatrix Codes, but it can be achived with additional tools.

Who has live customers creating Datamatrix Codes (maybe even with GS1 Standard) and which tools are the using ?

 

Kind regards
Tobias

entry.title: Payment Wizard didn't generate any documents
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My client is having a problem with the Payment Wizard where he executed the payment wizard and it didn´t generate any document, didn't also generate any error from step 7 to step 8.

After selecting the option "Execute Payment Run" the Summary says that were created a total of 0 documents.

My client selected the respective BP and also selected the documents which he wants the outgoing payments to be created.

*Images Attached

Can someone help please?

entry.title: SAP B1: Can I add a column to Inventory Status (Available-to-Promise) with UDF or UI API?
entry.content: Can I add a column to Inventory Status (Available-to-Promise) with UDF or UI API?

entry.title: Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row level.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please guide us on how Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row level.

The screenshot is attached below for your reference.

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.
